title: milosz14's optimized pack
description: My personal optimized pack! Made by players, for players.
body:
# milosz14's optimized pack
**Do you have 1 frame per a year?**\
**We created this modpack for you!**\
In this pack you can find a lot of optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, Exordium etc.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Tested on ogulnie.ga benchmark server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df39d980e7f23cd2e692fe42c6f4f0697d9200a6.png)\
**The average FPS on this modpack**\
Tested on computer with Windows 11, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Ti and AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D

</details>
